## ⚠️ Checklist
- [ ] I have enabled **Debug Mode** and checked the trap status.
- [ ] I have ensured all prerequisite mods (CBA, ACE, TaroTripwire) are up to date.
- [ ] I have read the Troubleshooting section in the README.

## Description
## Steps to Reproduce
1. Place a [TaroTripWire] in front of a door.
2. Initialize the trap with the provided script in the README.
3. Open the door via... (Normal open / ACE Incremental)
4. See error: (e.g., The trap does not detonate)

- **Debug Status:** - **DoorAnimationName (if any):** ## Environment
- **Map:** (e.g., Altis, Malden, or a Modded Map)
